title: C72 · Traversal ρ = Activation ρ at Two Scopes

story.text:
# 💡 C72 · Traversal ρ = Activation ρ at Two Scopes
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Traversal ρ of ARCH-1R/T and activation ρ of ARCH-1 are one operator at two scopes — local (state classification) and global (walk orbit). Active (35%).
